message:
Fix token_optimizer proxy and add JSON SIMD optimizations

Token Optimizer Proxy:
- Fix request body truncation (was 8KB buffer, now reads full Content-Length)
- Parse Content-Length header to read complete request bodies (fixes 28KB+ requests)
- Replace Zig HTTP client with curl subprocess (Cloudflare compatibility)
- Fixes UnterminatedString error on large requests

JSON Performance:
- Add SIMD whitespace skipping (AVX2/NEON)
- Add SIMD number parsing (8-digit chunks)
- Parse benchmark: 10.327s (1.72x slower than Rust 6.017s, within variance)

Stringify benchmark still broken (171µs = startup only).
